name: caliber-car-service
description: Caliber Car Service — luxury black car service marketing site (static).

scripts.build:og: python3 -m venv .venv-og 2>/dev/null; .venv-og/bin/pip install -q cairosvg pillow && .venv-og/bin/python scripts/build_og.py
scripts.build:favicon: python3 -m venv .venv-og 2>/dev/null; .venv-og/bin/pip install -q cairosvg pillow && .venv-og/bin/python scripts/build_favicon.py
scripts.build:logo: python3 -m venv .venv-og 2>/dev/null; .venv-og/bin/pip install -q cairosvg pillow && .venv-og/bin/python scripts/build_logo.py
scripts.build:wallpapers: python3 -m venv .venv-og 2>/dev/null; .venv-og/bin/pip install -q cairosvg pillow numpy pypng && .venv-og/bin/python scripts/build_wallpapers.py
scripts.build: npm run build:og && npm run build:favicon && npm run build:images && npm run build:landings
